steps.t: The messenger wants you to follow the road east, past the Hárveg Bridge. Before the road cuts into the Greylin River, there is an overlook to the sout…
The overlook is empty, save for a set of fresh footprints. Examining them could offer some insight.
An unfamiliar woman approached you once you defeated the Angmarim at the overlook. Talking to her may answer some of the questions you have.
